title: Adjuvant pressurized intraperitoneal aerosol chemotherapy (PIPAC) in suboptimally cytoreduced advanced ovarian cancer: a randomized phase II trial (PIPAC-OVA).
abstract: Patients with advanced epithelial ovarian cancer (EOC) who undergo suboptimal primary cytoreductive surgery (PCS) have poor outcomes with standard platinum-taxane chemotherapy. This randomized controlled trial evaluated whether adding adjuvant Pressurized Intraperitoneal Aerosol Chemotherapy with low-dose cisplatin and doxorubicin (PIPAC C/D) to first-line systemic therapy improves survival in this high-risk population.
trial_name: Randomized trial of doxorubicin vs doxorubicin plus cisplatin
